mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transport ( charge_cd, sender_company_id, sender_company_nm, sender_transport_shipper_cd, sender_region_cd, sender_region_dtl_cd, sender_manager_nm, sender_address, sender_tel_no, sender_manager_tel_no, sender_rmk, receiver_company_id, receiver_company_nm, receiver_transport_shipper_cd, receiver_region_cd, receiver_region_dtl_cd, receiver_address, receiver_tel_no, receiver_manager_tel_no, receiver_manager_nm, receiver_rmk, reg_id, reg_dt, shipment_operation_date, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{chargeCd}, #{senderCompanyId}, #{senderCompanyNm}, #{senderTransportShipperCd}, #{senderRegionCd}, #{senderRegionDtlCd}, #{senderManagerNm}, #{senderAddress}, #{senderTelNo}, #{senderManagerTelNo}, #{senderRmk}, #{receiverCompanyId}, #{receiverCompanyNm}, #{receiverTransportShipperCd}, #{receiverRegionCd}, #{receiverRegionDtlCd}, #{receiverAddress}, #{receiverTelNo}, #{receiverManagerTelNo}, #{receiverManagerNm}, #{receiverRmk}, #{regId}, NOW(), #{shipmentOperationDate}, #{chgId}, NOW(), 'N' ) RETURNING transport_id
mapper.update: UPDATE transport SET sender_company_id = #{senderCompanyId}, sender_company_nm = #{senderCompanyNm}, receiver_company_id = #{receiverCompanyId}, receiver_company_nm = #{receiverCompanyNm}, sender_transport_shipper_cd = #{senderTransportShipperCd}, receiver_transport_shipper_cd = #{receiverTransportShipperCd}, charge_cd = #{chargeCd}, sender_region_cd = #{senderRegionCd}, sender_region_dtl_cd = #{senderRegionDtlCd}, sender_manager_nm = #{senderManagerNm}, sender_address = #{senderAddress}, sender_tel_no = #{senderTelNo}, sender_manager_tel_no = #{senderManagerTelNo}, sender_rmk = #{senderRmk}, receiver_region_cd = #{receiverRegionCd}, receiver_region_dtl_cd = #{receiverRegionDtlCd}, receiver_manager_nm = #{receiverManagerNm}, receiver_address = #{receiverAddress}, receiver_tel_no = #{receiverTelNo}, receiver_manager_tel_no = #{receiverManagerTelNo}, receiver_rmk = #{receiverRmk}, chg_id = #{chgId}, chg_dt = NOW() WHERE transport_id = #{transportId}
UPDATE transport SET del_yn = 'Y', chg_id = #{chgId}, chg_dt = now() WHERE transport_id = #{transportId};
